verses.text: Nidang ciangin a upna panun mi pawlkhat pialin, zuauthu gente leh dawi thu a kigente a zuihna ding uh Kha Siangtho in teltakin a gen hi
Tua bang zuau thuhilhnate pen zuau genin mi a khem, sik emsa tawh tatgawp bangin a lungsim un a hoih leh a hoihlo a khenthei nawnlote' kam panin hong gingkhia ding hi

Tua bang mite in zi neih leh pasal neih ding, leh an pawlkhat nek ding hoihlo hi, ci uh hi. Ahi zongin thu umin, thuman thutak a thei mite in lungdamna ko-in a nek dingin Pasian in tua ante a bawl ahi hi
Pasian' bawlsa na khempeuh a hoih hi a, nialloin, lungdamna pulakin san' ding ahi hi
Pasian' thu leh thungetna hang tawh tuate a hoih a suak ahi hi.
Nang in na zuihsa upna thu leh thuhilhna man na zuih kawmin hih ka hong thugente, i sanggamte kiangah na gen nak leh Khrih Jesuh' nasem a hoih khat na hi ding hi
Pasian' thu tawh a kituaklo, a haihuai tangthu phuahtawmte ngaihsutin na nei vet kei in. Pasian' deihna tawh a kituakin na nuntak zawhna dingin na kisin in
Pumpi kisekin kisinna manpha hi. Ahi zongin kha thu-ah kisekin kisinna pen tuhun laitak leh a hong tungding hunah nuntakna hong piathei ahih manin manphazaw lai hi
ci-a kigen pen a man taktak thu hi a, umin sin dingin a kilawm thu ahi hi
A diakdiakin ei thu umte in mi khempeuh a Honkhia, a nungta Pasian muangin lamen ihih manin nakpi takin hanciamin na a sem ihi hi
Ka hong gensa thute na hilhsawn in
Khangno lai na hihna thu hangin mite' simmawh dingin na om kei in la, kampauna, gamtatna, itna, upna leh siangthona-ah thu um mite' etteh dingin na om in
Kei ka hong pai matengin mipi mai-ah Lai Siangtho simna, a khiatna genna, leh hanthotnate-ah tavuan na la in
Kamsangte' thugennate leh upate in na tungah a khut uh nga-in thu hong ngetsakna ahi nangma hihtheih siamnate na valkhongsak kei in
Mi khempeuh in na khan'tohna hong muhtheihna dingin hih thute limtakin ngaihsun in la, hahkatin na sem in
Na gamtatna leh na thuhilhnate-ah hoihtakin kidawmin om lecin nangmah-a kipan na thugen a za mite-a' dingin phattuamna omding ahih manin na nasepna-ah hoihtakin om in.
